text: I feel an odd mix of curiosity and displacement. The sterile environment and sharp blue lighting currently surrounding me press upon my senses, making me wonder about the interplay between technology and my own organic perception. As I step closer to the R+D display with its bold colors and explanations, I sense both excitement for innovation and a faint unease at the rapid march of machinery into spaces once full of unpredictability and warmth. It is a contemplative experience.
